name: python3-zict
title: python3-zict
description:
Mutable mapping tools for Python 3
The dictionary / mutable mapping interface is powerful and
multi-faceted.
.
* stores data in different locations such as in-memory, on disk, in
archive files, etc..
* manage old data with different policies like LRU, random eviction,
etc..
* might encode or transform data as it arrives or departs the
dictionary through compression, encoding, etc..
.
This contains the Python 3 version
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-zict because Mutable mapping tools for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-zict as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-zict with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-zict --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
